Our culture
![Our culture](https://www.riverlane.com/media/pnuntqe3/c0971_076e.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&quality=80&v=1dbbd43547e1850)
## Working at Riverlane - Our culture & values. Join us!
Riverlane’s diverse team and inclusive, value-driven culture make it a great place to grow and enrich your professional career. Every team member impacts our mission to achieve useful quantum computing sooner.
We are proud to have built a diverse community that contributes different ideas, perspectives and experiences. Our unique mix of skills and backgrounds fosters a positive culture of collaboration and continuous learning, where everyone is valued, respected and can reach their full potential.
We are proud winners of the 'Employer of the Year' category at the [2024 Cambridge Independent Science and Technology Awards](https://www.cambridgeindependent.co.uk/business/winners-of-the-2024-cambridge-independent-science-and-techno-9366508/).
![2024 Cambridge Independent Science and Technology Awards](https://www.riverlane.com/media/akljr3bm/riverlane.jpg?mode=max&width=315&height=177)
![Vacancies](https://www.riverlane.com/culture-careers)
## Vacancies
We are looking for talented people who want to make an impact. Riverlane offers exciting career opportunities across engineering, quantum science, product and operations.
[Join us](https://www.riverlane.com/jobs#vacancies)
![Internships](https://www.riverlane.com/culture-careers)
## Internships
Our full-time internships offer Master's and PhD students the opportunity to explore a career in quantum computing and translate their skills and expertise into a commercial setting. Applications open early October.
[Internships](https://www.riverlane.com/jobs/internships)
![Graduate Scheme](https://www.riverlane.com/culture-careers)
## Graduate Scheme
Our graduate scheme is designed to enable those with degrees in subjects such as Computer Science or Engineering to develop their skills and become future leaders in the quantum computing industry. Applications open early October.
[Find out more](https://www.riverlane.com/jobs/graduate-scheme)
Our values
![Open icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/05hjldwf/segment_open.svg)
Open
We act with integrity, delivering on our commitments and welcoming all people, ideas, partners and approaches
![Pioneering icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/kf5jl5ar/segment_flag.svg)
Pioneering
We are pioneers, exploring new ways to achieve quantum advantage sooner
![Curious icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/ixgpnlrj/segment_eye.svg)
Curious
We are inquisitive, eager to learn and unafraid to try new things and make mistakes
![User focused icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/k3gnlxnp/segment_focus.svg)
User focused
We develop great partnerships and focus on solutions to problems that matter
![Collaborative icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/1bdfb42u/segement_collaborative.svg)
Collaborative
We work together, leveraging our combined skills to build products that unleash the power of quantum computing
Our values 
## Diversity & Inclusion
We are committed to building a diverse workforce and creating and maintaining an inclusive working environment.
We are committed to building a diverse workforce and creating and fostering an inclusive working environment.
We follow best practices regarding diverse and inclusive recruitment approaches, provide resources and support for our underrepresented communities, and offer our employees enhanced maternity, paternity, and parental leave.
To further our understanding of DEIB issues and celebrate diversity, we hold several DEIB and cultural events throughout the year.
Given evidence that women are under-represented in the quantum industry, our primary focus is increasing the number of women at Riverlane. Although 30% of our workforce identifies as female - higher than the 26% national average across the UK technology industry – we aim to reach 35% by 2025 through targeted initiatives.
> "We believe that diversity drives innovation."
At Riverlane, we strive to create an inclusive work environment and culture where everyone feels valued and respected, a place where everybody belongs and where everyone can be themselves. Only by bringing our whole selves to work can we achieve our best, reach our potential and make quantum computing useful sooner.
[ ![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/0lwn0dfb/c0870_061e.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&quality=85&v=1dbbd435ca04f30) ](https://www.riverlane.com/media/0lwn0dfb/c0870_061e.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&quality=85&v=1dbbd435ca04f30)
## Featured employees
Learn more what it's like to work at Riverlane
## Together we engineer
To mark International Women in Engineering Day, we spoke with several of our brilliant engineers from our UK and US teams to gain insights into their roles, their experiences, and what it’s like to work on quantum’s greatest challenge: error correction.
### Andrea Husseini
Associate Product Manager 
We’ve teamed up with The Quantum Daily to share a behind the scenes look at what it’s like to be a part of the Riverlane team.
### Rojalin Mishra
Senior Hardware Verification Engineer 
"Joining Riverlane was stepping out of my comfort zone and I cannot imagine a better place for that. I am always encouraged and given time to build new skills for myself."

Our culture

Working at Riverlane - Our culture & values. Join us!

Riverlane’s diverse team and inclusive, value-driven culture make it a great place to grow and enrich your professional career. Every team member impacts our mission to achieve useful quantum computing sooner.

We are proud to have built a diverse community that contributes different ideas, perspectives and experiences. Our unique mix of skills and backgrounds fosters a positive culture of collaboration and continuous learning, where everyone is valued, respected and can reach their full potential.

We are proud winners of the 'Employer of the Year' category at the 2024 Cambridge Independent Science and Technology Awards.

At Riverlane, we strive to create an inclusive work environment and culture where everyone feels valued and respected, a place where everybody belongs and where everyone can be themselves. Only by bringing our whole selves to work can we achieve our best, reach our potential and make quantum computing useful sooner.
